svg.text: AY26 Assignment 2: Algorithmic Agent · NUS Design Platforms C
interrupt any state · priority: dizzy > scared > angry
energy (0–100) → glow, pulse speed, eye size
alertness (0–100) → body size, tentacles, eye spread
👆 touch · Feed / Calm / Play buttons → direct
each override blocks lower ones until recovered
solid arrow = trigger / forward dashed arrow = decay / recovery → AWARE is the recovery target for all overrides
